item.title: Presigned URLs are technically a security vuln
The console wars have been lost
item.description: Valve wins by doing absolutely nothing

item.title: Agents are monads (but not that kind)
item.description: I managed to write this without using the word endofunctor once. Wait, shit, I just did. Uhhh, oops!

item.title: "No way to prevent this" say users of only language where this regularly happens
"No way to prevent this" say users of only language where this regularly happens
I taught a bucket to speak git
I hate compilers
item.description: You'd think that given the same bytes of input you'd get the same bytes of output. lol. lmao. No, you don't. It's complicated.

item.title: Why are cached input tokens cheaper with AI services?
item.description: TL;DR: the GPU doesn't have to math as hard

item.title: Giving your Go apps Tigris superpowers
"No way to prevent this" say users of only language where this regularly happens
